top_signals.title: S&P 500 Rally Falters Before Fed as SpaceX Surges: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A rally that sent stocks to the brink of all-time highs faltered on the eve of the first Federal Reserve rate decision under Kevin Warsh, with a another slide in oil prices driving bond yields lower.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Economists bet on higher rates as Kevin Warsh takes reins at the Fed
top_signals.summary: Former financier to chair meeting for first time with inflation well above the US central bank’s target
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bank of Japan takes rates to 1%, the highest level since 1995
top_signals.summary: Inflation and the weak yen forced its hand and made it difficult to wait and see any longer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: UK Probes Whether Russia Fired Warning Shot at British Yacht
top_signals.summary: The UK is investigating whether a Russian Navy vessel fired warning shots at a British yacht just outside of its territorial waters.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Russian warship accused of firing warning shots towards yacht in Channel
top_signals.summary: Ministry of Defence says it is ‘investigating reports of incident’
